positive: Minimalist geometric forest creature silhouette, stylized and abstract, resembling a mystical fox blending with foliage. The design should feature bold, clean outlines and a striking contrast between solid black silhouettes and an ethereal, vibrant gradient background of deep indigo and teal. Elements of nature, such as stylized leaves, moons, and geometric mountain ranges, should frame the main subject in a balanced, circular composition. Clean vectors, high contrast, perfect symmetry, suitable for apparel printing, linocut aesthetic, graphic design, poster art, zen style, deep jewel tones, negative space emphasis.
